inputs.label: Weight in Hundredweight
inputs.businessContext: Enter the weight in hundredweight to convert to pounds.

businessContext_i18n.en: Enter the weight in hundredweight to convert to pounds.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pound'a dönüştürmek için hundredweight cinsinden ağırlığı girin.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Pounds per hundredweight. Default 100 for short hundredweight; use 112 for long hundredweight.

businessContext_i18n.en: Pounds per hundredweight. Default 100 for short hundredweight; use 112 for long hundredweight.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hundredweight başına pound. Kısa hundredweight için varsayılan 100; uzun hundredweight için 112 kullanın.

inputs.label: Number of Items
inputs.businessContext: Number of identical items. Use 1 if converting a single weight.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of identical items. Use 1 if converting a single weight.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aynı öğelerin sayısı. Tek bir ağırlık dönüştürülüyorsa 1 kullanın.

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the output.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for the output.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
